_comment_global_skip_paths: all modes: matching paths are skipped from path-based checks and from file content scanning
_comment_content_skip_extensions: all modes: matching extensions are not opened for line-by-line content scanning; this does not block push by itself
_comment_global_error_filenames: all modes: matching file names become error findings even if file content is not scanned
_comment_content_allow_paths: all modes: matching paths skip line-based content pattern checks only; filename and push-extension checks still apply

content_allow_paths.reason: fixture data may intentionally contain sample markers
public export fixture data may intentionally contain sample markers

_comment_content_allow_patterns: all modes: matching lines skip content error and warning pattern checks

content_allow_patterns.name: project contact email
content_allow_patterns.reason: intentional public contact address in README

content_allow_patterns.name: sample windows paths in docs
content_allow_patterns.reason: intentional path examples in README and sample configs

_comment_content_error_patterns: all modes: matching lines become error findings and stop the script at the end
_comment_content_warning_patterns: all modes: matching lines become warning findings but do not fail unless the script is run with -FailOnWarning
_comment_push: push mode checks staged paths, staged added lines, configured extra paths, and unpushed history against the tracked upstream or the fallback range

push._comment_prefer_upstream_unpushed_range: push mode: when true, inspect @{u}..HEAD first; if no upstream exists, fallback_history_range is used
push._comment_scan_additional_paths: push mode: always scan these working-tree files or folders recursively in addition to staged and unpushed diffs
push._comment_fallback_history_range: push mode: history range used only when upstream tracking cannot be resolved
push._comment_blocked_extensions: push mode: matching extensions are treated as errors when they appear in staged or unpushed changed paths
push._comment_blocked_extension_allow_paths: push mode: path exceptions for blocked_extensions only; these do not affect content pattern scanning

blocked_extension_allow_paths.reason: optional public export bundles stay local and are gitignored by default

_comment_release: release mode recursively scans the configured export targets for filename risks and text-content patterns

release._comment_scan_targets: release mode: recursively scan these folders or files

_comment_history: history mode scans git patch history instead of the working tree

history._comment_scan_range: history mode: git log range to inspect when -HistoryRange is not passed
